Broad clinical support

Ease is built from the ground up for behavioral health practices, with AI at the core.

$2.5B+
claims processed
11M+
payor claims submitted
The problem

Fragmented CRM, EHR, and RCM systems are inefficient. They slow intake, burden staff, and hide revenue leakage.

The solution

Instead of bouncing between CRM, EHR, and RCM systems, Ease provides one AI-powered system for referrals, clinical notes, and billing.

Why Ease

A super-powered system, working together.

See everything in one place.
Consolidate tools, reduce spend, and gain unified reporting without painful integrations.
Get more done, more easily.
AI support helps admins, clinicians, supervisors, and billers complete important tasks in less time.
Bill on time, every time.
AI-driven billing engine and expert services run in the background so you collect more, faster.

An EHR designed for how clinicians actually work.

Accurate and organized EHR
An EHR built for speed and efficiency. AI-powered documentation lets clinicians spend time with patients,  not forms.
Fewer clicks
AI documentation
Higher staff satisfaction
Faster implementation
Explore the EHR
Admissions that run smoothly
A CRM that manages referrals, tracks conversion, sends forms, checks eligibility, and hands off cleanly to other teams without third-party tools or integrations.
Higher conversions
Fewer handoffs
Less manual work
Native to platform
Explore CRM
Billing that feels in-house
A native RCM engine that powers expert billing services with real-time visibility, fast follow-up, and transparent reporting.
Faster collections
Fewer denials
Real-time visibility
AI-assisted workflows

Standards and reporting

Compliance you can count on

HIPAA-compliant platform with end-to-end encryption and secure data handling
ONC-certified EHR meeting federal interoperability and documentation standards
Supports state-specific behavioral health requirements (licensure, scope, parity laws)
Audit-ready documentation and secure access controls for PHI
Reliable uptime & cloud-based infrastructure with continuous backups
Role-based permissions to safeguard sensitive clinical and billing data

About us

Built with experts  for real-world care

Ease was built alongside clinicians and practice leaders who understand the reality of modern behavioral health care. From documentation and scheduling to billing and reporting, every workflow reflects how care actually happens—not how legacy systems force it to happen.
